summary: Mira OS Natural Language Search feature on /celebrate-new page tested. All 10 features pass. Search bar renders with magic wand icon and natural language placeholder. Pet-First personalization working - when logged in as dipali@clubconcierge.in, search bar shows 'Ask Mira: Lola's birthday cake or heart shape' and example chips include 'Lola's birthday cake' and 'Maltese cake'. Natural language parsing works: 'heart shape' shows 'Found heart-shaped options!', 'labrador cake' shows 'Labrador cakes coming right up!' and switches to Breed tab. Product modal shows personalization fields (pet selection, name, age, date).

issues: Search button (mira-search-btn) visibility issue when suggestions dropdown is open - clicking requires force=True in automation

critical_code_review_comments: MiraOSSearchBar component (lines 304-486) correctly implements natural language parsing via parseMiraQuery function
parseMiraQuery (lines 176-298) detects: occasions, shapes, categories, breeds, flavors, dietary preferences, price ranges, quick filters
Pet-First personalization works via activePet prop - example queries dynamically include pet name (line 321)
ActiveMiraFilters component (lines 492-556) displays detected search criteria as badges
Tab switching via handleMiraSearch (lines 1107-1135) correctly navigates based on detected category
Product filtering in getFilteredProducts (lines 1260-1363) applies all detected criteria
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user with pet 'Lola' (Maltese)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira OS Natural Language Search is fully functional on /celebrate-new. Key data-testids: mira-os-search, mira-search-input, mira-search-btn. Search parses natural language queries and extracts: category, shape, breed, occasion, flavor, dietary, price range. When logged in with a pet profile, search suggestions are personalized with pet name. Example chips update dynamically. Product modal includes personalization fields for pet selection from user's pet list.

features_tested.search_bar_renders: PASS - MiraOSSearchBar component renders with data-testid='mira-os-search'
features_tested.magic_wand_icon: PASS - Wand2 icon displays in search bar with gradient background
features_tested.natural_language_placeholder: PASS - Shows 'Ask Mira: birthday heart cake or breed cake' (logged out) or pet-specific placeholder
features_tested.example_query_chips: PASS - Shows 6 example chips: your pet's birthday cake, heart shape cake, breed cake, party hamper, desi treats, bestsellers under 500
features_tested.personalized_search_logged_in: PASS - When logged in, shows 'Lola's birthday cake', 'Maltese cake' chips and 'Celebrations for Lola' hero
features_tested.heart_shape_search: PASS - Typing 'heart shape' shows Mira response 'Found heart-shaped options!'
features_tested.labrador_cake_breed_detection: PASS - Typing 'labrador cake' shows 'Labrador cakes coming right up!' and switches to Breed tab
features_tested.birthday_cake_filtering: PASS - Typing 'birthday cake' filters to cake products (113 items loaded)
features_tested.product_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking product tile opens ProductDetailModal
features_tested.modal_personalization_fields: PASS - Modal shows: pet selection dropdown, pet name input, pet age input, date picker, delivery time selector

api_endpoints_verified: Products load correctly - 498 products for 'all' tab, 45 for 'breed-cakes' tab
User pets API works - user has 7 pets including Lola (Maltese)
console_warnings: Failed to fetch picks (pillar-wise picks API) - non-blocking
Failed to fetch VAPID key - notifications API, non-blocking
